subcodes.first_line: O thou who art bewildered in the wilderness of love, traverse thou, like unto the morning zephyrs, through the gardens of the hearts of the beloved of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته صحرای عشق چون نسائم صبحگاهی در ریاض قلوب احبای الهی مرور نما دلها
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the power of words; of speech, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat]
